nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to cognitive skills
nodes.grounding_span: my workflows and efficiency have definitely improved with AI

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: it quickly became apparent that it was way more complex than the AI had originally led me to believe

nodes.label: Human writing and creative control
nodes.grounding_span: Writing is an art, and if everything ends up being written by AI, i would view it as a problem

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I find it to be much more successful and accurate when you work through a project with it step by step

nodes.label: AI as tool for critical thinking about AI
nodes.grounding_span: I worry that as I'm increasingly challenging my brain less and less to problem solve, I might be losing the ability to think critically

nodes.label: Human cognitive exercise and skill preservation
nodes.grounding_span: I worry about the cognitive effect it might be having on me

nodes.label: Authentic personal expression
nodes.grounding_span: this is inherently human, and should remain that

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: upon completion of the working CRM, I was delighted

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for email drafting
nodes.grounding_span: I abandoned the project and wasted hours on it

nodes.label: Concern about improper AI use by others
nodes.grounding_span: I'm a little more mindful with how I do so

nodes.label: Reluctance to use AI for writing
nodes.grounding_span: I would never ask AI to write an entire article

nodes.label: Systematic iterative decomposition of tasks
nodes.grounding_span: work through a project with it step by step

nodes.label: Metacognitive awareness of cognitive decline
nodes.grounding_span: I worry about the cognitive effect it might be having on me
